name: earlyatlas
description: Early Atlas — a free, open, schema-validated early-childhood curriculum, with an Astro site and a reviewed authoring pipeline.

scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p packages/curriculum-schema/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/curriculum-core/tsconfig.json && pnpm --filter @earlyatlas/web exec astro check
scripts.check: pnpm lint && pnpm lint:css && pnpm format:check && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm validate && pnpm check:docs && pnpm build
